evidence_summary: ClamAV flagged /var/www/html/vendor/magento/module-ui/view/base/requirejs-config.js as Js.Exploit.Agent-7. The file SHA256 matches Magento 2.4.7-p3's published vendor hash. Operator asks: does this constitute a FP, and should the file be excluded from future ClamAV scans of the /vendor/ tree?
